name: octo-apm-assistant-genai-llmetry
description: Span query for Drone Shop assistant, Select AI, OCI GenAI, guardrails, Langfuse, and LLMetry latency/error analysis.
queryText: show (spans) TraceId, ServiceName as Service, OperationName as Operation, SpanDuration as Duration where ServiceName in ('octo-drone-shop','octo-drone-shop-oke') and (OperationName like '%assistant%' or OperationName like '%genai%' or OperationName like '%llm%' or OperationName like '%selectai%')
